name: Desktop Dinosaurs
short_description: Enjoy watching cute hand animated dinosaurs inspired by 90's Tamagotchi live directly on your desktop. Manage your environment, resources to raise and evolve your dinosaurs during their entire life. But don't forget to show them love! Dinosaurs need love!
detailed_description:
Enjoy watching cute hand animated dinosaurs inspired by 90's Tamagotchi live directly on your desktop. Manage your environment, resources to raise and evolve your dinosaurs during their entire life. But don't forget to show them love! Dinosaurs need love!

Features 🦕

  • Watch ​your dinosaurs live (eat, sleep, die...)
  • 2 game modes:
    • Overlay: play directly on your windows desktop (available only on Windows)
    • Fullscreen: play with an animated background, dynamics lighning reflecting the current time of the day.

  • 5 species currently available : Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Tyranosaurus, Pachycephalosaurus, Parasaurolophus, Ankylosaurus (more to come)
  • Pet dinosaurs
  • Name your dinosaurs
  • Randomly generated dinosaur colors amoung 27 color sets
  • A shop where you can buy new dinosaurs eggs, food, decorations, toys
